title: 2023 Census data user guide | Stats NZ

## 2023 Census data user guide
26 September 2024, 10:00am
2023 Census data user guide provides information about collecting, processing, interpreting, and the ways of using 2023 Census data.
- 2023 Census data user guide Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 755 KB
